title: Battle Lance
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Battle Lance'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' |line=[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]][[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] |model=[[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] |type=[[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]{{DB|starship|imperialstardestroyer|Imperial Star Destroyer}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=37,000 |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed=By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]The ''Battle Lance'' was destroyed prior to the end of the [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] novel, which takes place from [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] per ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''. Therefore, the ''Battle Lance'' must have been destroyed by 0 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]. |retired= |battles= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |navy=[[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|I had a nephew who was a deck monkey on the ''Battle Lance''.''"
"''Yeah. I knew a couple of guys shipped on her. It was a freak accident.|Tenn Graneet and Mekkar Doan|}} The '''''Battle Lance''''' was a 1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meter]]–long [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Warship/Legends|warship]] was selected to test an improved prototype [[Hypermatter reactor/Legends|hypermatter reactor]]. Due to a malfunction, the [[Zero-point energy|null-point energy]] produced by the drive became unstable and vaporized the ''Battle Lance'' in a [[Microsecond/Legends|microsecond]], [[Death/Legends|killing]] the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] entire crew of 37,000. [[Hora Graneet]], the nephew of [[Imperial gunner/Legends|Imperial gunner]] [[Tenn Graneet]], served on the ship and died during the accident. Sometime between [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] and [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Graneet mentioned the ''Battle Lance''{{'s}} destruction to explain to [[Chief Petty Officer/Legends|Chief Petty Officer]] [[Mekkar Doan]] why he had doubts about the functionality of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]]. Doan, who had been smiling, grew somber and stated that he had known multiple personnel aboard the ''Battle Lance''. After the conversation, Graneet felt unsettled as he compared the power of that [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] with the power of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Concave Dish Composite Beam Superlaser|superlaser]]. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Battle Lance'' was mentioned in the [[2007]] novel [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']], written by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]]. ==Appearances== *[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Battle Lance }} [[Category:Imperial II-class Star Destroyers]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]]
